TEn: A Registrar needs to add a Professor’s details
SP: Registrar enters details for the Professor
C-Reg validates the entered data and checks if the data describe a Professor who already exists
C-Reg creates a new Professor
Display error message

TEn: A Registrar needs to enquire on a Professor’s details
SP: Registrar enters Professor ID
C-Reg retrieves the Professor details
C-Reg displays the Professor details
Display error message

TEn: A Registrar needs to modify a Professor’s details
SP: Registrar modifies the displayed details for the Professor
C-Reg validates the details and updates the Professor record
Display error message

TEn: A Registrar needs to delete a Professor’s details
SP: Registrar presses the delete command for the Professor whose details are displayed
C-Reg asks Course Catalog if Professor has any Course Offering commitments
Course Catalog replies 'yes' or 'no'
C-Reg deletes the Professor
Display error messages

TEn: A Professor needs to enquire on Course Offerings

Course Offering data: Maximum number of students that may be enrolled

SP: The Professor enters his ID
C-Reg retrieves the Professor’s qualifications and Department
C-Reg sends Professor’s qualifications and Department to Course Catalog to retrieve eligible and committed Course Offerings
Course Catalog returns the relevant Course Offerings
C-Reg displays the Professor’s Department
C-Reg displays the returned Course Offerings
Display error message

TEn: A Professor needs to create Course Offering commitments

Count of conflicting courses: Count of conflicting Course Offering selections

SP: The Professor selects the Course Offerings by entering his ID in each Offering that he wishes to teach
C-Reg sends the Professor’s selected Course Offerings to the Course Catalog
C-Reg receives the count of Course Offerings that conflict from the Course Catalog
C-Reg receives the IDs of any conflicting pairs of Course Offerings from the Course Catalog
C-Reg updates the display of Course Offerings with conflicts (if any), or 'Commitments accepted'
Display error/confirmation message

TEn: A Professor needs to modify Course Offering commitments

Count of conflicting courses: Count of conflicting Course Offering selections

SP: Professor modifies his Course Offering selections by entering or removing his ID
C-Reg sends the Professor’s selected Course Offerings to the Course Catalog
C-Reg receives the count of Course Offerings that conflict from the Course Catalog
C-Reg receives the IDs of any conflicting pairs of Course Offerings from the Course Catalog
C-Reg updates the display of Course Offerings with conflicts (if any), or 'Commitments accepted'
C-Reg sends an e-mail for broadcast to Students
Display error message

TEn: A Professor needs to delete Course Offering commitments
SP: Professor enters his ID and presses delete command
C-Reg sends IDs of deleted Course Offerings to Course Catalog
C-Reg sends an e-mail for broadcast to Students
Display error message
